case_title: GREGORY D EDWARDS VS. NICHOLAS S CHUNG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED SEP-15-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, NICHOLAS S
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY EDWARDS, GREGORY D AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, NICHOLAS S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-29-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, NICHOLAS S

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, GREGORY D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUNG, NICHOLAS S $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,265.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, GREGORY D AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, NICHOLAS S

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF GREGORY D. EDWARDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS S. CHUNG IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
